description: From the Publisher Gorilla Tape Tough & Wide Gorilla Tape is extra strong, double-thick and incredibly tough. Whether you need to stick rough, smooth or uneven surfaces, this is the duct tape with extra grip. Indoors and out, you can use Gorilla Tape where you want. The rugged all-weather shell withstands the elements, and the double-thick adhesive remains strong, whatever it faces. Designed to be tearable, developed to be durable, Gorilla Tape stands up to the test. Product Features Grips Rough & Uneven Surfaces Double thick adhesive. Can be used on rough, uneven surfaces for extra grip. Weather Resistant Tough, weather-resistant shell. Helps create a barrier that can withstand hard elements. Extra Thick & Strong Strong, reinforced backing. The tight weave reinforces, but Gorilla Tape can still be ripped neatly by hand.
